bugs_found.description: Seeding race condition: useEffect([]) captures empty store on mount (WebSocket hasn't connected). When real data arrives, all existing subagents appear as 'new spawns'. Same issue for task seeding (lines 698-707).
bugs_found.fix: Changed deps from [] to [sessions]/[tasksBySession], added early return if data is empty

bugs_found.description: useMemo staleness: ref mutations (connectionBufferRef etc.) don't trigger re-renders. A standalone disconnect event won't show until something else updates the store.
bugs_found.fix_note: Edge case — store updates arrive together in practice

bugs_found.description: Unused TeamTask import — only used indirectly via tasksBySession type inference.
Stale team events use new Date().toISOString() — causes stale warnings to always sort to top of feed on every render.

suspicious_patterns: activityDedupeRef grows unboundedly — new unique composite keys added but never evicted. Practically harmless since activity buffer is capped at 50.
Date.now() in event IDs means React keys are unstable if same logical event produced across renders — mitigated by ref-based accumulation pattern.
data_flow_issues: Seeding pattern was a race condition with async WebSocket data (FIXED).
Ref buffers accumulate events across renders but old events from hours ago persist — acceptable for a log panel.
verdict: Functional code that compiles and renders correctly. Main bug (seeding race) fixed. Pass with noted edge cases.
